fields.name: Initiated By User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the User ID which has initiated the workflow.

fields.name: Date-Time Initiated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time of the workflow entries.

fields.name: Last Date-Time Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the workflow entry was last modified.

fields.name: Last Modified By User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who last modified the workflow entry.
